channel.title: Kazhnuz/awesome-gnome Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: Kazhnuz/awesome-gnome May 3rd - May 9th, 2021
item.description:
Developer Resources

Libraries

  • libadwaita - Library that contain official GNOME patterns and widgets (GTK4)
  • libdazzle - Companion library to GObject and Gtk+, providing various new features. (GTK3)
  • libhandy - Building blocks for modern adaptive GNOME apps (GTK3)

item.title: Kazhnuz/awesome-gnome Mar 29th - Apr 4th, 2021
item.description:
Applications

Multimedia

  • Clapperstars122 - Simple and modern media player.

item.title: Kazhnuz/awesome-gnome Mar 22nd - Mar 28th, 2021
item.description:
Developer Resources

Documentations

  • GTK Documentation - Official GTK documentation.
  • GJS Guide - Guide for GJS.

item.title: Kazhnuz/awesome-gnome Mar 15th - Mar 21st, 2021
item.description:
Applications

Utilities

  • Koohastars167 - A simple screen recorder.

item.title: Kazhnuz/awesome-gnome Feb 22nd - Feb 28th, 2021
item.description:
Applications

Multimedia

  • Spotstars864 - Spotify Client.

item.title: Kazhnuz/awesome-gnome Feb 15th - Feb 21st, 2021
item.description:
Developer Resources

Examples

  • Hello - Set of Hello World examples for GNOME/GTK in different languages.

item.title: Kazhnuz/awesome-gnome Jan 25th - Jan 31st, 2021
item.description:
Applications

Internet and Networking

  • Font Downloaderstars23 - Get fonts from Google Font.
  • Tangramstars125 - Group your webapps into a single application.

    • Applications

    Well Being

  • Blanket - Listen to different sounds.
  • Health - Health tracking.

    • Applications

    Multimedia

  • Cozystars829 - Audiobook player.
  • Video Trimer - Trim video quickly.

    • Applications

    Graphics

  • Curtail - Simple & useful image compressor.
  • Drawingstars420 - Responsive drawing application.
  • Identity - Compare image and video.

    • Applications

    System and Customization

  • Déjà Dup Backups - Simple backups tool.
  • GNOME Tweaks - Graphical interface for advanced GNOME settings.

    • Applications

    Utilities

  • Dialect - Translate text.
  • Markets - Stock, currency and cryptocurrency tracker.

    • Applications

    Security and Privacy

  • Obfuscate - Censor private information.
  • Metadata Cleaner - View and clean metadata in files.
  • Password Safe - Keepass-compatible password manager.
  • Passbook - Password manager compatible with freedesktop secrets.

    • Applications

    Development and Design

  • GNOME Builder - Official IDE for creating GNOME applications.
  • Gaphor - The simple modeling tool for UML and SysML.
  • Webfont Kit Generatorstars20 - Create @font-face kits easily.

    • Extensions

    Menus

  • Arc Menu - Windows7-like application menu inspired by the one in Zorin OS.

    • Look and Feel

    Upstream-based

  • Popstars558 - Official theme of Pop!_OS by System76. (GTK, Shell)

item.title: Kazhnuz/awesome-gnome Nov 23rd - Nov 29th, 2020
item.description:
Extensions

Applets

  • Extensions Syncstars103 - Syncs gnome shell keybindings, tweaks settings and extensions with their configuration across all gnome installations.
  • Caffeine - Applet that let you deactivate the GNOME lock screen.

item.title: Kazhnuz/awesome-gnome Nov 2nd - Nov 8th, 2020
item.description:
Applications

Utilities

  • Sunflower - Small and highly customizable twin-panel file manager.

item.title: Kazhnuz/awesome-gnome Oct 26th - Nov 1st, 2020
item.description:
Applications

Productivity and Time

  • Solanum - Balance working time and break time.

    • Applications

    System and Customization

  • Pika Backup - Simple backups based on borg.

    • Applications

    Internet and Networking

  • Fragments - BitTorrent client.
  • Newsflash - RSS feeds reader.

    • Applications

    Office

  • Apostrophe - Distraction-free Markdown editor.

    • Applications

    Multimedia

  • Shortwave - Client for web-based radio.

item.title: Kazhnuz/awesome-gnome Oct 12th - Oct 18th, 2020
item.description:
Third-party Apps Plugins

  • Nautilus Terminalstars171 - Integrates a terminal into Nautilus.

    • Extensions

    Usage Experience

  • Coverflow Alt-Tabstars235 - Advanced fullscreen app switcher.
  • Custom Hot Cornersstars33 - Customize hot corners on every screen and every corner.
  • Multi Monitors Add-Onstars354 - Adds a top panel and workspace overview to every monitor.
  • Simple Off Menu - Removes selected power options from system menu.

    • Extensions

    Audio

  • Application Volume Mixerstars21 - Control volume output per-application.
  • Sound Input & Output Device Chooserstars393 - Quickly switch between different input and output devices.

    • Extensions

    Visual Changes

  • Blyrstars229 - Apply a blur effect to the overview and top panel background.
  • Transparent Shellstars3 - Makes some UI elements transparent.
  • Compiz alike windows effectstars43 - Adds wobbly effects to windows.

item.title: Kazhnuz/awesome-gnome Sep 14th - Sep 20th, 2020
item.description:
Applications

Graphics

  • Color Picker - Color pickle, working on both X11 and Wayland.

item.title: Kazhnuz/awesome-gnome Jun 8th - Jun 14th, 2020
item.description:
Applications

Utilities

  • RecAppstars79 - User friendly Open Source screencaster.

item.title: Kazhnuz/awesome-gnome Jun 1st - Jun 7th, 2020
item.description:
Developer Resources

Documentations

  • GJS Documentation - Documentation for the JavaScript GTK bindings.

    • Look and Feel

    Flat

  • Arcstars504 - Flat theme with transparent elements. (GTK, Shell)

item.title: Kazhnuz/awesome-gnome May 25th - May 31st, 2020
item.description:
Applications

Multimedia

  • Podcasts - Listen to your favourite podcasts.

    • Applications

    Others

  • Boxes - View, access, and manage remote and virtual systems.

item.title: Kazhnuz/awesome-gnome Jan 6th - Jan 12th, 2020
item.description:
Applications

Utilities

  • GPastestars489 - Clipboard manager (composed of an application and a gnome-shell extension).

item.title: Kazhnuz/awesome-gnome Oct 7th - Oct 13th, 2019
item.description:
Applications

Design Tooling

  • Icon Preview - Simple utility to preview icons.
  • Palette - Tool for viewing the GNOME colour palette.
  • Contrast - Checks the contrast between two colors.
  • Icon Library - Find the right icon to use on your GNOME application.

    • Applications

    System and Customization

  • HydraPaper - Set a different background for each monitor.

item.title: Kazhnuz/awesome-gnome Sep 30th - Oct 6th, 2019
item.description:
Applications

Internet and Networking

  • Cawbird - Twitter client.
  • Jami - Client for Jami, a secure communication tool.

item.title: Kazhnuz/awesome-gnome Sep 16th - Sep 22nd, 2019
item.description:
Applications

Office

  • Pdftagstars41 - Simple metadata editor for PDFs.
  • Markerstars660 - Markdown editor with an integrated previewer.
  • Foliatestars2.7k - Simple and modern eBook reader.
  • PDF Slicer - Simple application to extract, merge, rotate and reorder pages of PDF documents.

    • Extensions

    Desktop

  • Notesstars47 - Customizable sticky notes.

    • Look and Feel

    Themes

  • Oomoxstars1.5k - Generates different color variations of Numix and Materia themes.

    • Look and Feel

    Upstream-based

  • Yarustars944 - Ubuntu's official community-made style. (GTK, Shell)

    • Look and Feel

    Material

  • Vimixstars1.4k - A flat Material Design theme. (GTK, Shell)
  • Plata - A Gtk theme based on Material Design Refresh. (GTK, Shell)
  • Materiastars3k - Material Design-like theme. (GTK, Shell)

    • Look and Feel

    Upstream Style

  • Pop!stars101 - Official icon theme of Pop!_OS by System76.
  • GNOME++stars98 - Third-party application icons compatible with GNOME's current guidelines.

    • Look and Feel

    Cursors

  • ComixCursors - X11 mouse theme with a comics feeling.

    • Extensions

    Menus

  • Application Menu - Category-based menu for applications.
  • Places Indicator - Menu that provides fast access to your folders.

    • Extensions

    Complete overhaul

  • Dash-to-Panel - Make your desktop more similar to W7/KDE.

    • Applications

    Productivity and Time

  • GNOME Todo - Minimal task manager.
  • GTimeLogstars188 - Simple app for keeping track of time.
  • Gnome Pomodoro - Simple pomodoro timer.
  • Timetrack - Time tracker.

    • Applications

    System and Customization

  • Tilixstars4.5k - Tiling terminal emulator.
  • Unifydmin - Unified administration panel for heterogeneous Linux servers.

    • Applications

    Utilities

  • Catfish - Simple search application.
  • Detwinner - Simple and fast tool for removing duplicate files.
  • Recipes - Cooking application.

    • Applications

    Development and Design

  • GNOMIT - Simple Git commit message editor.

    • Applications

    Internet and Networking

  • Geary - Modern mail client, created originally by Yorba.
  • Feeds - An RSS/Atom feed reader.
  • Haguichi - Graphical frontend for Hamachi.

    • Applications

    Multimedia

  • Celluloidstars550 - Simple frontend for mpv.
  • Curlew - Multimedia converter.
  • Pitivi - Beautiful and powerful video editor.

    • Applications

    Graphics

  • GThumb - Powerful and advanced application to manage your photos and images.

    • Applications

    Gaming

  • Lutrisstars4.3k - Open Source gaming platform.

    • Extensions

    Applets

  • Todo.txt - Interface for todo.txt.
  • GSConnectstars1.9k - KDE Connect implementation.
  • KStatusNotifiers/AppIndicator Support - Appindicator systray.

    • Extensions

    Windows

  • PaperWMstars1.4k - Tiled scrollable window management.

    • Extensions

    Docks and Panels

  • Dash-to-Dock - A fully-featured dock.

    • Extensions

    Services integration

  • GMail Message Traystars60 - Integrate GMail with your desktop.

    • Community

    Official Venues

  • GNOME News Feed - Official news posts.

item.title: Kazhnuz/awesome-gnome Jul 8th - Jul 14th, 2019
item.description:
Third-party Apps Plugins

  • Firefox GNOME Themestars869 - Integrate Firefox into GNOME-based desktop using Adwaita.

item.title: Kazhnuz/awesome-gnome Mar 25th - Mar 31st, 2019
item.description:
Community

Official Venues

  • GNOME's Discourse
  • GNOME Wiki
  • #gnome on GIMPNet - General-purpose GNOME IRC channel (complete list of channels)

    • Community

    GNOME on Social Networks

  • @GNOMEDesktop on Facebook
  • GNOMEDesktop on Peertube
  • @gnome on floss.social

item.title: Kazhnuz/awesome-gnome Aug 27th - Sep 2nd, 2018
item.description:
Applications

System and Customization

  • Dynamic Wallpaper Editorstars128 - Utility for editing GNOME's XML wallpapers

    • Extensions

    Desktop

  • Places and Files Direct Accessstars4 - Access your places and files directly on your desktop.

    • Extensions

    Applets

  • Emoji Selectorstars263 - Emoji picker applet.

item.title: Kazhnuz/awesome-gnome Jun 25th - Jul 1st, 2018
item.description:
Applications

Internet and Networking

  • Eolie - Web browser that uses vertical tabs.

    • Applications

    Office

  • Paperwork - Personal document manager for scanned documents and PDFs.

    • Applications

    Multimedia

  • Lollypop - Beautiful music application.

item.title: Kazhnuz/awesome-gnome Jan 22nd - Jan 28th, 2018
item.description:
Extensions

Applets

  • Time ++ - A todo.txt manager, time tracker, timer, stopwatch, pomodoro, and alarm clock.

    • Look and Feel

    Cursors

  • Bibatastars486 - Silm material-based cursor theme.
  • Capitaine Cursorsstars758 - An x-cursor theme inspired by macOS and based on KDE Breeze. Designed to be paired with La Capitaine icons.

item.title: Kazhnuz/awesome-gnome Dec 18th - Dec 24th, 2017
item.description:
Extensions

Applets

  • Docker Integrationstars128 - An extension for managing docker containers

item.title: Kazhnuz/awesome-gnome Sep 25th - Oct 1st, 2017
item.description:
Community

Official Venues

  • Planet GNOME - Federation of GNOME Developers' blogs

    • Community

    GNOME Communities

  • Reddit
  • Stack Overflow

    • Community

    GNOME on Social Networks

  • @gnome on Twitter
  • GNOMEDesktop on Youtube

item.title: Kazhnuz/awesome-gnome Sep 11th - Sep 17th, 2017
item.description:
Look and Feel

Homogeneous Icons

  • Numix Squarestars134 - Flat square icon theme.
  • Numix Circlestars685 - Flat rounded icon theme.

item.title: Kazhnuz/awesome-gnome Aug 14th - Aug 20th, 2017
item.description:
Applications

Internet and Networking

  • GNOME Web - Official web browser project of GNOME.

    • Applications

    Office

  • NFO Viewerstars90 - Simple viewer for NFO files, beating text editors with preset font and encoding settings and clickable hyperlink support.

    • Applications

    Multimedia

  • Nuvola Player - Runtime for web-based music streaming services providing a more native user experience and integration with Linux desktop environments.
  • Vocalstars290 - Powerful, beautiful, and simple podcast client for the modern free desktop.
  • Parlatype - Audio player specialized for transcription.
  • Pulseeffectstars2.3k - Provides limiter, compressor, reverberation, equalizer and auto volume effects for PulseAudio applications.

    • Applications

    Graphics

  • Coulrstars22 - Convert between RGB and hexadecimal codes for colours.

    • Applications

    Gaming

  • GNOME Games - Game launcher and an emulation frontend to libretro.

    • Applications

    System and Customization

  • Menulibre - Manage your applications categories if you use a traditional application menu like Arc or the Application Menu.

    • Applications

    Utilities

  • Peekstars7.6k - Simple screen recorder that saves your recording as a GIF.

    • Extensions

    Applets

  • Removable Drive Menu - Status menu to show your removable drives.
  • OpenWeather - Weather applet.
  • Focuslistars69 - Ambient noise applet.
  • Clipboard Indicatorstars396 - Simple clipboard applet.
  • Desk Changerstars59 - Wallpaper slideshow applet.

    • Look and Feel

    Flat

  • Numixstars1.1k - Popular flat semi-dark theme with an orange touch. (GTK)
  • Zukitrestars550 - Flat grey theme, part of the zuki-theme suite. (GTK, works with Zuki-Shell for the shell theme)

    • Look and Feel

    Skeumorphic

  • Greybirdstars331 - Official Xubuntu theme. (GTK)
  • Zukitwostars550 - Skeumorphic grey theme, part of the zuki-theme suite. (GTK, works with Zuki-Shell for the shell theme).

    • Look and Feel

    Material Icons

  • Paper - Material icon theme.
  • Papirusstars4.2k - Material icon theme, initially based on Paper.

    • Look and Feel

    Flat Icons

  • La Capitainestars1.8k - Icon inspired by macOS and Material Design guidelines.

    • Look and Feel

    Homogeneous Icons

  • Obsidianstars117 - Continuation of the famous Faenza theme.

    • Look and Feel

    Skeumorphic Icons

  • Elementary XFCEstars211 - Desktop-agnostic version of the icons of elementary OS.

    • Developer Resources

    Documentations

  • GNOME Newcomers Wiki - Perfect place to start contributing to GNOME.
  • GNOME Developer Center - Contains all the official GNOME documentations.
  • Valadoc - Documentation about Vala.
  • The Python GTK+ 3 Tutorial - Introduction to writing GTK+ 3 applications in Python.
